app.name: My Yarn Stash
app.extra_stream: Awin shop commissions on in-app yarn purchases (Knit Picks, Minerva)
app.monetisation: recurring Premium subscription + Awin shop commission share
app.live_status: App Store live since May 2026, Awin postback in end-to-end verification

short.tagline: Photo of the yarn label, AI auto-fills everything, matches to Ravelry patterns from your stash. Plus shop commissions.
short.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash is an iOS + Android app for hobby knitters and crocheters. Photograph the yarn label, AI extracts material, yardage, needle, manufacturer and colour. The app matches Ravelry patterns the user can knit from their current stash. Plus: project tracking, FO logbook, pattern-match history, group sharing for knit circles. Two revenue rails: 50% on Premium subs AND a share of Awin shop commissions on in-app yarn purchases.
short.who_for: Hobby knitters, crocheters, fibre artists. Audience skews ~90% female, high purchasing power (yarn re-bought every 3-6 weeks), EU + US + UK + AU.
key_features: Vision-AI label scan: material, yardage, needle, manufacturer, colourway, weight from one photo.
Pattern matching: "patterns I can knit right now from my stash".
Project tracking + FO logbook with photo.
Group sharing for knit circles.
Awin in-app shop rail: deep-linked Knit Picks + Minerva purchases.
business_model_lines: Two revenue streams: recurring Premium sub + Awin shop commission share.
Premium pricing: 4.99 USD / month or 29.99 USD / year.
Free tier: 30 yarn items, 1 group up to 5 members, manual + photo scan, pattern-match search.
Premium unlocks: unlimited stash, unlimited groups, AI pattern-match, advanced tracking.
Shop rail: ~5-10% Awin commission per basket; affiliate gets a share for 24 months.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Your link yarnstash.app/i/[handle] works on every platform. Android attribution deterministic via Google's install-referrer. iOS warm uses Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic) uses our own signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink — live-verified, no Branch.io. RevenueCat fires on Premium purchase, 50% credited for 24 months. Awin commissions on yarn purchases from referred users are also tracked and credited.
short.see_long_pointer: For the full attribution walkthrough plus how the Awin shop-commission rail attributes to the same handle as the Premium sub, see the Extended Brief PDF.

long.tagline: Photo of the yarn label, AI auto-fills everything, matches to Ravelry patterns from your stash. Plus shop commissions.
long.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash is an iOS + Android app for hobby knitters and crocheters. Photograph the yarn label, AI extracts material, yardage, needle recommendation, manufacturer and colour. The app then matches Ravelry patterns the user can actually knit with their current stash. Plus: project tracking, FO logbook (finished objects), pattern-match history, and group sharing for knit circles. Two revenue rails: 50% on Premium subs AND a share of Awin shop commissions when the referred user buys yarn in-app.
long.who_for: Hobby knitters, crocheters and fibre artists from beginners with a single shelf to power users with several hundred labels. Audience skews ~90% female, high purchasing power (yarn re-bought every 3-6 weeks), EU + US + UK + AU. Creator archetypes: independent pattern designers, KnittingTok and CrochetTok creators, indie yarn dyers, stash-tour reel makers, finished-project carousel creators, granny-square content, fibre-festival recap creators.
key_features: Vision-AI label scan: material, yardage, needle, manufacturer, colourway, weight from one photo.
Pattern matching: stash items matched against Ravelry patterns. "Patterns I can knit right now from my stash".
Project tracking + FO logbook: in-progress with photo, finished objects archive, yardage used per project.
Group sharing for knit circles: 1 small group on Free (5 members), unlimited on Premium.
Awin in-app shop rail: deep-linked Knit Picks + Minerva, no separate browser flow.
Discover tab for pattern designers.
business_model_lines: Two revenue streams: recurring Premium subscription + Awin shop commission share.
Premium pricing: 4.99 USD / month or 29.99 USD / year (no annual discount, no free trial).
Free tier generous: 30 yarn items, 1 group up to 5 members, manual + photo scan, pattern-match search.
Premium unlocks: unlimited stash, unlimited groups, AI pattern-match, advanced tracking.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
pricing_lines: Premium: 4.99 USD / month or 29.99 USD / year.
Shop rail: Klar earns ~5-10% Awin commission per basket; affiliate share is a portion for 24 months from referred user's first purchase.
ASC live since May 2026; affiliate share is always 50% of the then-current Premium price.
long.market_gap: Ravelry's mobile experience has been broken since the 2020 redesign disaster. Ravelry has 10M+ registered users, most maintain stash and pattern queues, but the official mobile app is functionally abandoned — accessibility complaints led to the redesign rollback, the underlying tech is still 2015-era, and there is no AI-anything. Every knitter has a phone, a physical stash growing in their living room, and the chronic "I know I have yarn for this pattern, I just can't remember" pain. That is the gap. My Yarn Stash fills it with better UX, AI auto-fill (label scan nothing else offers), and pattern-match against the user's actual stash. The Awin shop rail is the second unlock — knitters re-buy yarn constantly, so a single converted user's lifetime affiliate value compounds on every restock.
long.business_model_why_now: Three shifts make My Yarn Stash possible in 2026. First, Vision LLM costs dropped enough that scanning every yarn label at 0.005-0.01 USD per call is economically viable inside a 5 USD/month price point. Second, Ravelry's API access has been stable enough since 2024 that pattern matching against a live stash is reliable. Third, Awin's iOS-deep-link infrastructure matured enough in 2024-2025 that in-app yarn purchases attribute cleanly through to the affiliate.
long.why_this_works: Ravelry's mobile app is genuinely dead since the 2020 redesign disaster — 10M+ users without a native solution. My Yarn Stash fills the gap with better UX and AI auto-fill that nothing else offers. The pattern-match feature solves "stash blindness". Two revenue rails mean affiliates earn on subs AND on every yarn purchase by referred users — knitters re-buy yarn every 3-6 weeks, so the Awin tail compounds meaningfully over 12-24 months.

short.tagline: Foto vom Wollet-Label, KI füllt alles aus, matcht zu Ravelry-Mustern aus deinem Stash. Plus Shop-Provisionen.
short.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash ist eine iOS + Android-App für Hobby-Stricker und -Häkler. Foto vom Wollet-Label, KI extrahiert Material, Lauflänge, Nadel-Empfehlung, Hersteller und Farbe. Die App matcht Ravelry-Muster die der User aus seinem aktuellen Stash stricken kann. Plus: Projekt-Tracking, FO-Logbuch, Pattern-Match-Verlauf, Group-Sharing für Strick-Kreise. Zwei Revenue-Schienen: 50% auf Premium-Subs UND ein Anteil der Awin-Shop-Provisionen bei In-App-Wollkäufen.
short.who_for: Hobby-Stricker, -Häkler, Faser-Künstler. Audience ~90% weiblich, hohe Kaufkraft (Wolle wird alle 3-6 Wochen nachgekauft), EU + US + UK + AU.
key_features: Vision-KI-Label-Scan: Material, Lauflänge, Nadel, Hersteller, Farbe, Gewicht aus einem Foto.
Pattern-Matching: "Muster die ich jetzt aus meinem Stash stricken kann".
Projekt-Tracking + FO-Logbuch mit Foto.
Group-Sharing für Strick-Kreise.
Awin In-App-Shop-Schiene: deep-linked Knit Picks + Minerva.
business_model_lines: Zwei Revenue-Schienen: wiederkehrende Premium-Sub + Awin-Shop-Provisions-Anteil.
Premium-Pricing: 4,99 USD / Monat oder 29,99 USD / Jahr.
Free-Tier: 30 Wollwaren, 1 Gruppe bis 5 Mitglieder, manuell + Foto-Scan, Pattern-Match-Suche.
Premium schaltet frei: unbegrenzter Stash, unbegrenzte Gruppen, KI-Pattern-Match, erweiterten Tracking.
Shop-Schiene: ~5-10% Awin-Provision pro Warenkorb; Affiliate bekommt Anteil für 24 Monate.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Dein Link yarnstash.app/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform. Android-Attribution deterministisch via Google Install-Referrer. iOS warm nutzt Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% Creator-Traffic) nutzt unseren eigenen signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink — live-verifiziert, kein Branch.io. RevenueCat feuert beim Premium-Kauf, 50% für 24 Monate gutgeschrieben. Awin-Provisionen auf Wollkäufe von referrals werden ebenfalls getrackt und gutgeschrieben.
short.see_long_pointer: Für das volle Attribution-Walkthrough plus wie die Awin-Shop-Provisions-Schiene auf denselben Handle wie die Premium-Sub attribuiert, siehe das Extended Brief PDF.

long.tagline: Foto vom Wollet-Label, KI füllt alles aus, matcht zu Ravelry-Mustern aus deinem Stash. Plus Shop-Provisionen.
long.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash ist eine iOS + Android-App für Hobby-Stricker und -Häkler. Foto vom Wollet-Label, KI extrahiert Material, Lauflänge, Nadel-Empfehlung, Hersteller und Farbe. Die App matcht dann Ravelry-Muster die der User tatsächlich aus seinem aktuellen Stash stricken kann. Plus: Projekt-Tracking, FO-Logbuch (Finished Objects), Pattern-Match-Verlauf, Group-Sharing für Strick-Kreise. Zwei Revenue-Schienen: 50% auf Premium-Subs UND ein Anteil der Awin-Shop-Provisionen wenn der referrierte User Wolle In-App kauft.
long.who_for: Hobby-Stricker, -Häkler und Faser-Künstler von Beginnern mit einem einzelnen Regal bis Power-Usern mit mehreren hundert Labels. Audience ~90% weiblich, hohe Kaufkraft (Wolle alle 3-6 Wochen nachgekauft), EU + US + UK + AU. Creator-Archetypen: unabhängige Pattern-Designer, KnittingTok- und CrochetTok-Creator, Indie-Wollfärber, Stash-Tour-Reel-Macher, FO-Carousel-Creator, Granny-Square-Content, Fiber-Festival-Recap-Creator.
key_features: Vision-KI-Label-Scan: Material, Lauflänge, Nadel, Hersteller, Farbe, Gewicht aus einem Foto.
Pattern-Matching: Stash-Items gegen Ravelry-Muster gematcht.
Projekt-Tracking + FO-Logbuch: in-Progress mit Foto, FO-Archiv, tatsächlich verbrauchte Lauflänge.
Group-Sharing für Strick-Kreise: 1 kleine Gruppe auf Free (5 Mitglieder), unbegrenzt auf Premium.
Awin In-App-Shop-Schiene: deep-linked Knit Picks + Minerva, kein separater Browser-Flow.
Discover-Tab für Pattern-Designer.
business_model_lines: Zwei Revenue-Schienen: wiederkehrende Premium-Subscription + Awin-Shop-Provisions-Anteil.
Premium-Pricing: 4,99 USD / Monat oder 29,99 USD / Jahr (kein Jahres-Rabatt, kein Free-Trial).
Free-Tier großzügig: 30 Wollwaren, 1 Gruppe bis 5 Mitglieder, manuell + Foto-Scan, Pattern-Match-Suche.
Premium schaltet frei: unbegrenzter Stash, unbegrenzte Gruppen, KI-Pattern-Match, erweiterten Tracking.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
pricing_lines: Premium: 4,99 USD / Monat oder 29,99 USD / Jahr.
Shop-Schiene: Klar verdient ~5-10% Awin-Provision pro Warenkorb; Affiliate-Share ist Anteil davon für 24 Monate ab dem ersten Kauf des referrierten Users.
ASC live seit Mai 2026; Affiliate-Share ist immer 50% des aktuellen Premium-Preises.
long.market_gap: Ravelrys Mobile-Erfahrung ist seit dem 2020er-Redesign-Disaster kaputt. Ravelry hat 10M+ registrierte User, die meisten pflegen Stash und Pattern-Queues, aber die offizielle Mobile-App ist funktional verlassen — Barrierefreiheits-Beschwerden führten zum Redesign-Rollback, die zugrundeliegende Tech ist immer noch 2015er-Ära, und es gibt kein KI-anything. Jeder Stricker hat ein Handy, einen physischen Stash der im Wohnzimmer wächst, und den chronischen "Ich weiß ich habe Wolle für dieses Muster, ich kann mich nur nicht erinnern"-Pain. Das ist die Lücke. My Yarn Stash füllt sie mit besserer UX, KI-Auto-Fill (Label-Scan den sonst keiner bietet) und Pattern-Match gegen den echten Stash des Users. Die Awin-Shop-Schiene ist der zweite Unlock — Stricker kaufen ständig Wolle nach, also compoundet der lifetime Affiliate-Wert eines einzelnen konvertierten Users auf jedem Restock.
long.business_model_why_now: Drei Verschiebungen machen My Yarn Stash 2026 möglich. Erstens, Vision-LLM-Kosten sind genug gefallen dass jedes Wollet-Label scannen bei 0,005-0,01 USD pro Call ökonomisch tragbar ist im 5-USD/Monat-Preispunkt. Zweitens, Ravelrys API-Zugang ist seit 2024 stabil genug dass Pattern-Matching gegen einen Live-Stash zuverlässig läuft. Drittens, Awins iOS-Deep-Link-Infrastruktur reifte 2024-2025 genug dass In-App-Wollkäufe sauber zum Affiliate attribuieren.
long.why_this_works: Ravelrys Mobile-App ist tot seit dem 2020er-Redesign-Disaster — 10M+ User ohne native Lösung. My Yarn Stash füllt die Lücke mit besserer UX und KI-Auto-Fill den sonst keiner bietet. Das Pattern-Match-Feature löst "Stash-Blindheit". Zwei Revenue-Schienen bedeuten Affiliates verdienen auf Subs UND auf jedem Wollkauf von referrals — Stricker kaufen alle 3-6 Wochen nach, also compoundet der Awin-Tail über 12-24 Monate bedeutend.

short.tagline: Foto dell'etichetta del filato, AI riempie tutto, match con pattern Ravelry dal tuo stash. Plus commissioni shop.
short.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash è un'app iOS + Android per knitter e crocheter hobby. Fotografi l'etichetta, AI estrae materiale, metratura, ferri, produttore, colore. L'app matcha pattern Ravelry che puoi lavorare dal tuo stash. Plus: tracking progetti, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing. Due rotte: 50% su sub Premium E quota commissioni Awin sugli acquisti filato in-app.
short.who_for: Hobby knitter, crocheter, artisti fibra. Audience ~90% femminile, alto potere d'acquisto (filato ricomprato ogni 3-6 settimane), EU + US + UK + AU.
key_features: Scan etichetta Vision-AI: materiale, metratura, ferri, produttore, colore, peso da una foto.
Pattern matching: "pattern che posso lavorare ora dal mio stash".
Tracking progetti + FO logbook con foto.
Group sharing per circoli knitting.
Awin in-app shop: acquisti deep-linked Knit Picks + Minerva.
business_model_lines: Due fonti: abbonamento Premium ricorrente + quota commissione shop Awin.
Premium: 4,99 USD/mese o 29,99 USD/anno.
Tier gratis: 30 filati, 1 gruppo fino a 5 membri, manuale + foto-scan, pattern-match search.
Premium sblocca: stash illimitato, gruppi illimitati, AI pattern-match, tracking avanzato.
Shop: ~5-10% commissione Awin per cestino; affiliato prende una quota per 24 mesi.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Il tuo link yarnstash.app/i/[handle] funziona su ogni piattaforma. Attribuzione Android deterministica via install-referrer. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% traffico creator) deferred-deeplink firmato via clipboard — verificato live, senza Branch.io. RevenueCat fa fuoco all'acquisto Premium, 50% accreditato per 24 mesi. Commissioni Awin su acquisti filato di referrals anche tracciate e accreditate.
short.see_long_pointer: Per walkthrough completo + come la rotta shop-commissione Awin attribuisce allo stesso handle, vedi il Brief Esteso PDF.

long.tagline: Foto dell'etichetta del filato, AI riempie tutto, match con pattern Ravelry dal tuo stash. Plus commissioni shop.
long.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash è un'app iOS + Android per hobby-knitter e crocheter. Fotografi l'etichetta, AI estrae materiale, metratura, ferri raccomandati, produttore, colore. L'app matcha pattern Ravelry che puoi davvero lavorare con il tuo stash attuale. Plus: tracking progetti, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing per circoli. Due rotte: 50% su sub Premium E quota commissioni shop Awin quando il referral compra filato in-app.
long.who_for: Hobby knitter, crocheter e artisti fibra da principianti con uno scaffale a power user con centinaia di etichette. Audience ~90% femminile, alto potere d'acquisto (filato ricomprato ogni 3-6 settimane), EU + US + UK + AU. Archetipi creator che convertono bene: pattern designer indipendenti, creator KnittingTok e CrochetTok, dyer di filato indie, stash-tour reel maker, FO carousel creator, granny-square content, fiber-festival recap creator.
key_features: Scan etichetta Vision-AI.
Pattern matching contro Ravelry.
Tracking progetti + FO logbook.
Group sharing per circoli knitting (1 piccolo gruppo Free, illimitato Premium).
Awin in-app shop: Knit Picks + Minerva deep-linked.
Discover tab per pattern designer.
business_model_lines: Due fonti: abbonamento Premium ricorrente + quota commissione shop Awin.
Premium: 4,99 USD/mese o 29,99 USD/anno (no sconto annuale, no prova gratuita).
Tier gratis generoso: 30 filati, 1 gruppo fino a 5 membri.
Premium sblocca: stash illimitato, gruppi illimitati, AI pattern-match, tracking avanzato.
Premium gratuito a vita per affiliati onboarded.
pricing_lines: Rotta shop: Klar guadagna ~5-10% commissione Awin per cestino; affiliato prende quota per 24 mesi.
long.market_gap: L'esperienza mobile di Ravelry è rotta dal disastro del redesign 2020. Ravelry ha 10M+ utenti registrati, la maggioranza mantiene stash e queue di pattern, ma l'app mobile ufficiale è funzionalmente abbandonata — le lamentele di accessibilità hanno portato al rollback, la tecnologia sottostante è ancora era 2015, e non c'è AI. Ogni knitter ha un telefono, uno stash fisico che cresce in salotto, e il dolore cronico "so di avere filato per questo pattern, non riesco a ricordare". Quella è la lacuna. My Yarn Stash la riempie con UX migliore, AI auto-fill (scan etichetta che nessuno offre), e pattern-match contro lo stash reale. La rotta shop Awin è il secondo sblocco — knitter ricomprano filato costantemente, valore lifetime del singolo utente convertito composta su ogni restock.
long.business_model_why_now: Tre cambiamenti rendono My Yarn Stash possibile nel 2026. Primo, i costi Vision LLM scesi abbastanza che scansionare ogni etichetta a 0,005-0,01 USD per call è economicamente sostenibile al prezzo 5 USD/mese. Secondo, l'accesso API di Ravelry stabile dal 2024 abbastanza che il pattern matching contro stash live è affidabile. Terzo, l'infrastruttura deep-link iOS di Awin maturata 2024-2025 abbastanza che gli acquisti filato in-app attribuiscono pulitamente all'affiliato.
long.why_this_works: L'app mobile di Ravelry è morta dal disastro redesign 2020 — 10M+ utenti senza soluzione nativa. My Yarn Stash riempie il vuoto con UX migliore e AI auto-fill che nessun altro offre. Il pattern-match risolve la "stash blindness". Due rotte significano che affiliati guadagnano su sub E su ogni acquisto filato di referral — knitter ricomprano ogni 3-6 settimane, l'Awin tail composta significativamente su 12-24 mesi.

L'app matche les patterns Ravelry que tu peux vraiment tricoter avec ton stash actuel. Plus : tracking projets, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing pour cercles. long.market_gap: L'expérience mobile de Ravelry est cassée depuis le désastre du redesign 2020. Ravelry a 10M+ utilisateurs enregistrés, la majorité maintient stash et queues de patterns, mais l'app mobile officielle est fonctionnellement abandonnée — les plaintes d'accessibilité ont mené au rollback, la tech sous-jacente est encore ère 2015, et il n'y a pas d'IA. Chaque knitter a un téléphone, un stash physique qui grandit dans le salon, et la douleur chronique "je sais que j'ai du fil pour ce pattern, je ne peux pas me souvenir". C'est la lacune. My Yarn Stash la remplit avec meilleure UX, IA auto-fill (scan étiquette que personne offre), et pattern-match contre le stash réel. Le rail shop Awin est le second déblocage — knitters rachètent du fil constamment, la valeur lifetime du seul utilisateur converti compose sur chaque restock.
long.business_model_why_now: Trois changements rendent My Yarn Stash possible en 2026. D'abord, les coûts Vision LLM baissés assez pour que scanner chaque étiquette à 0,005-0,01 USD par call soit économiquement viable au prix 5 USD/mois. Ensuite, l'accès API de Ravelry stable depuis 2024 assez pour que le pattern matching contre stash live soit fiable. Enfin, l'infrastructure deep-link iOS d'Awin mûrie 2024-2025 assez pour que les achats fil in-app attribuent proprement à l'affilié.
long.why_this_works: L'app mobile de Ravelry est morte depuis le désastre redesign 2020 — 10M+ utilisateurs sans solution native. My Yarn Stash remplit le vide avec meilleure UX et IA auto-fill que personne d'autre n'offre. Le pattern-match résout la "stash blindness". Deux rails signifient que les affiliés gagnent sur subs ET sur chaque achat fil de referrals — knitters rachètent toutes les 3-6 semaines, l'Awin tail compose significativement sur 12-24 mois.

Shop: ~5-10% comisión Awin por cesta; afiliado se lleva parte por 24 meses.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Tu enlace yarnstash.app/i/[handle] funciona en cualquier plataforma. Atribución Android determinística vía install-referrer. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99 % tráfico creator) deferred-deeplink firmado vía portapapeles — verificado en vivo, sin Branch.io. RevenueCat se dispara en la compra Premium, 50 % acreditado durante 24 meses. Comisiones Awin en compras hilo de referrals también rastreadas y acreditadas.
short.see_long_pointer: Para walkthrough completo + cómo la vía comisión-shop Awin atribuye al mismo handle, ver el Brief Ampliado PDF.

long.tagline: Foto de la etiqueta del hilo, IA rellena todo, match con patrones Ravelry de tu stash. Plus comisiones shop.
long.what_it_is: My Yarn Stash es una app iOS + Android para hobby-knitters y crocheters. Fotografías la etiqueta, IA extrae material, metraje, agujas recomendadas, fabricante, color. La app matchea patrones Ravelry que realmente puedes tejer con tu stash actual. Plus: tracking proyectos, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing para círculos. Dos vías: 50% en sub Premium Y parte comisiones shop Awin cuando el referral compra hilo in-app.
long.who_for: Hobby knitters, crocheters y artistas fibra de principiantes a power users con cientos de etiquetas. Audiencia ~90% femenina, alto poder adquisitivo (hilo recomprado cada 3-6 semanas), EU + US + UK + AU. Arquetipos creators que convierten bien: pattern designers independientes, creators KnittingTok y CrochetTok, dyers de hilo indie, stash-tour reel makers, FO carrusel creators, granny-square content, fiber-festival recap creators.
key_features: Escaneo etiqueta Vision-IA.
Pattern matching contra Ravelry.
Tracking proyectos + FO logbook.
Group sharing para círculos tejido (1 grupo pequeño Free, ilimitado Premium).
Awin in-app shop: Knit Picks + Minerva deep-linked.
Discover tab para pattern designers.
business_model_lines: Dos fuentes: suscripción Premium recurrente + parte comisión shop Awin.
Premium: 4,99 USD/mes o 29,99 USD/año (sin descuento anual, sin prueba gratuita).
Nivel gratis generoso: 30 hilos, 1 grupo hasta 5 miembros.
Premium desbloquea: stash ilimitado, grupos ilimitados, IA pattern-match, tracking avanzado.
Premium gratis de por vida para afiliados onboarded.
pricing_lines: Vía shop: Klar gana ~5-10% comisión Awin por cesta; afiliado se lleva parte por 24 meses.
long.market_gap: La experiencia mobile de Ravelry está rota desde el desastre del rediseño 2020. Ravelry tiene 10M+ usuarios registrados, la mayoría mantiene stash y colas de patrones, pero la app mobile oficial está funcionalmente abandonada — las quejas de accesibilidad llevaron al rollback, la tecnología subyacente sigue era 2015, y no hay IA. Cada knitter tiene móvil, un stash físico creciendo en la sala, y el dolor crónico "sé que tengo hilo para este patrón, no consigo recordar". Esa es la laguna. My Yarn Stash la rellena con mejor UX, IA auto-fill (escaneo etiqueta que nadie más ofrece), y pattern-match contra el stash real. La vía shop Awin es el segundo desbloqueo — knitters recompran hilo constantemente, el valor lifetime del único usuario convertido compone en cada restock.
long.business_model_why_now: Tres cambios hacen My Yarn Stash posible en 2026. Primero, los costos Vision LLM bajaron lo suficiente para que escanear cada etiqueta a 0,005-0,01 USD por llamada sea económicamente viable al precio 5 USD/mes. Segundo, el acceso API de Ravelry estable desde 2024 lo suficiente para que el pattern matching contra stash en vivo sea fiable. Tercero, la infraestructura deep-link iOS de Awin madura 2024-2025 lo suficiente para que las compras hilo in-app atribuyan limpiamente al afiliado.
long.why_this_works: La app mobile de Ravelry está muerta desde el desastre rediseño 2020 — 10M+ usuarios sin solución nativa. My Yarn Stash rellena el hueco con mejor UX y IA auto-fill que nadie más ofrece. El pattern-match resuelve la "stash blindness". Dos vías significan que afiliados ganan en subs Y en cada compra hilo de referrals — knitters recompran cada 3-6 semanas, el Awin tail compone significativamente sobre 12-24 meses.

en.subtitle: for knitting and crochet creators — and what the research says about how to pitch it
en.hero_quote: Photo of the yarn label in, app extracts everything, matches with Ravelry patterns from your stash. Earn from what you already share.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: My Yarn Stash is an iOS + Android app for hobby knitters and crocheters. Photograph the yarn label, AI extracts material, yardage, needle, manufacturer and colour. App matches Ravelry patterns you can actually knit with YOUR stash. Plus: project tracking, FO logbook, pattern-match history, group sharing. App Store live since May 2026.
en.why_this_works: Ravelry's mobile app is dead since the 2020 redesign. 10M+ knitters without a native solution. My Yarn Stash fills the gap with AI auto-fill nothing else has.
free_vs_premium: Free: 30 yarn items, 1 group up to 5 members, manual + photo scan, pattern-match search.
Premium (4.99 USD/m or 29.99 USD/y): unlimited stash, unlimited groups, AI pattern-match, advanced tracking.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
en.creator_types_intro: Find your row. For knitting/crochet, two rails matter — sub conversion AND Awin shop attach. Designers and dyers convert weak on subs but strong on shop. Numbers are sub-only; Awin is additive.

creator_types_table.hooks: "What's in my designer's stash"; pattern-design process with stash; "the app I use to plan my designs"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 3-5% on subs, very high Awin attach

creator_types_table.hooks: Yarn label scan demo; stash-tour with app overlay; project-match reveal; "I finally know what I have"
"Dyeing a colourway, here's how my customers track it"; stash-organisation showcase
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4% on subs, very high Awin attach

creator_types_table.hooks: Stash tour with app-scan overlay; festival haul with label-scan reel; pattern-match-from-haul demo
FO carousel with app's yardage data in caption; project log time-lapse; stash-to-FO journey
"Granny square but make it stash-aware"; beginner stash setup; "my first scan and what it found"

ugc_strategy.archetype: You with your yarn. Designer at your desk with WIPs. Dyer in your studio. Stash-tour host with your physical shelves. Audience tells within 2 seconds whether you actually own and use the yarn. Sokolova and Kefi (2020) applies double-strength to craft — knitters follow makers.
hook_examples: "What's in my designer's stash and what the AI thinks I should knit" — desk shot, scanning labels.
"I scanned my entire stash and here's what I found" — emotional payoff.
"My fibre-festival haul, every label scanned" — haul reel.
"How I plan my next design" — designer process vlog.
"As an indie dyer, this is what I tell my customers to use" — authority play.
"What I learned scanning 200 labels" — pattern-discovery.
"My stash before and after the AI" — before/after reveal.
"Three months of using this — honest review" — straight to camera.
format_templates: Project storyline: scan → pattern → FO arc.
do_dont: Do: link in caption AND IG bio.
Don't: skip the Awin angle for designer/dyer audiences.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Hands-on-yarn POV. Stash flat-lay. Finished-project carousel. Top-down craft shots. Knot Stitch-style hands-only YouTube. Fibre-arts is unusually faceless-friendly because the work IS the demonstration.
hook_examples: Top-down stash scan demo.
Hands-on-yarn stash organisation time-lapse.
Silent FO carousel.
Voiceover-only walkthrough: hands working.
ASMR-adjacent: yarn-handling sounds + scanning beats.
Stop-motion: yarn balls organising into app categories.
Tutorial carousel: "How to use the AI label scan".
Time-lapse: 60 seconds from "shelves of unknown yarn" to "organised stash".
do_dont: Do: keep ambient sound (yarn rustle, needle clicks).
Don't: skip the FO logbook moment in finished-project carousels.

audience_fit_good: Independent pattern designers (very high engagement + Awin attach).
Indie yarn dyers (trusted by stash collectors).
audience_fit_poor: General DIY / craft accounts without yarn focus.
Aesthetic-only fibre content (slow-motion yarn-petting without actual knitting).
Non-knitting handicraft (sewing, embroidery — wrong stash app).
en.posting_cadence: Craft: Sunday morning 8-11h + Wednesday evening 19-21h local. KnittingTok: weekend mornings peak. Pattern designers post in arcs (design → process → sample → release). 1 reel per week. Stories during fibre festivals or pattern drops drive conversion.
en.conversion_math: 50% rev share on Premium (24 months) + Awin commission share on every yarn purchase from referred users (24 months). Premium 4.99 USD/m or 29.99 USD/y. Independent pattern designer (40k IG): 18,000 views x 2.5% CTR = 450 clicks, 35% install = 158 installs, 6% Premium = 9 subs (~135 USD/yr) + Awin attach: 30% become yarn buyers, 47 buyers x 3 baskets/yr x ~5 USD share = ~700 USD/yr Awin. Total ~835 USD/yr from one reel. CrochetTok mid-tier (100k TT): 50,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 750 clicks, 30% install = 225 installs, 4% Premium = 9 subs (~135 USD) + Awin: 25% buyer-rate = 56 x 2 x 4 USD = ~450 USD. Total ~585 USD/yr. Indie yarn dyer (10k IG carousel): 4,000 views x 4% CTR = 160 clicks, 50% install = 80 installs, 8% Premium = 6 subs (~90 USD) + Awin very high (audience is buyers already), 60 x 5 x 5 USD = ~1,500 USD/yr. Total ~1,590 USD/yr — designers and dyers have the highest LTV.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, label-scan demo footage, stash-tour B-roll, colour palette and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/yarnstash/brand-assets.
faq: How does the Awin commission work?
User clicks your link, installs, buys yarn in-app via Knit Picks or Minerva, Awin fires a postback. Klar earns ~5-10% commission on basket; your share is a portion. 24-month attribution window.
Doesn't attribute — only in-app via the Awin-deep-linked shop rail. Feature not bug: clean attribution beats fuzzy 'maybe' tracking.
Yes, but Ravelry has rules about derivative content. Always link your own designs back to Ravelry as primary source.
Not a fit — different app. We're building specifically for yarn-based crafts.
Designer and dyer audiences command higher rates because of niche-trust. Mid-tier 150-500 USD, macros 500-1500 USD. Rev share + Awin on top.
Yes. Rev-share + Awin commission = paid recommendation. Craft audiences are unforgiving of hidden affiliate links.
en.closing: Honest read: My Yarn Stash fits creators who actually knit or crochet. Designers, dyers, KnittingTok, CrochetTok, stash-tour, FO carousels — all good fits. Aesthetic-only fibre content where nobody actually knits is not a fit. The Awin rail makes designer and dyer creators particularly lucrative because their audience already buys yarn constantly. Reply to Mail 2 — yes, no, or 'let's see if my audience buys yarn'.

de.subtitle: für Strick- und Häkel-Creator — und was die Forschung über das Pitching sagt
de.hero_quote: Foto vom Wollet-Label rein, App extrahiert alles, matcht mit Ravelry-Mustern aus deinem Stash. Verdien an dem was du eh teilst.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: My Yarn Stash ist eine iOS + Android-App für Hobby-Stricker und -Häkler. Foto vom Wollet-Label, KI extrahiert Material, Lauflänge, Nadel, Hersteller und Farbe. App matcht Ravelry-Muster die du aus DEINEM Stash stricken kannst. Plus: Projekt-Tracking, FO-Logbuch, Pattern-Match-Verlauf, Group-Sharing. App Store live seit Mai 2026.
de.why_this_works: Ravelrys Mobile-App ist seit dem 2020er-Redesign tot. 10M+ Stricker ohne native Lösung. My Yarn Stash füllt die Lücke mit KI-Auto-Fill den sonst keiner hat.
free_vs_premium: Free: 30 Wollwaren, 1 Gruppe bis 5 Mitglieder, manuell + Foto-Scan, Pattern-Match-Suche.
Premium (4,99 USD/m oder 29,99 USD/y): unbegrenzter Stash, unbegrenzte Gruppen, KI-Pattern-Match, erweiterten Tracking.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
de.creator_types_intro: Finde deine Zeile. Bei Strick/Häkel zählen zwei Schienen — Sub-Conversion UND Awin-Shop-Attach. Designer und Färber konvertieren schwach auf Subs aber stark auf Shop. Zahlen sind nur Sub; Awin ist additiv.

creator_types_table.hooks: "Was ist im Stash meiner Designerin"; Pattern-Design-Prozess mit Stash; "die App die ich nutze um meine Designs zu planen"
Wollet-Label-Scan-Demo; Stash-Tour mit App-Overlay; Project-Match-Reveal; "endlich weiß ich was ich habe"
"Färben einer Farbpartie, so tracken meine Kunden sie"; Stash-Organisations-Showcase
Stash-Tour mit App-Scan-Overlay; Festival-Haul mit Label-Scan-Reel; Pattern-Match-von-Haul-Demo
FO-Carousel mit Lauflängen-Daten in Caption; Projekt-Log-Time-Lapse; Stash-zu-FO-Reise
"Granny-Square aber stash-bewusst"; Anfänger-Stash-Setup; "mein erster Scan und was er fand"

ugc_strategy.archetype: Du mit deiner Wolle. Designerin am Schreibtisch mit WIPs. Färberin in deinem Studio. Stash-Tour-Hostin mit deinen physischen Regalen. Audience erkennt in 2 Sekunden ob du die Wolle besitzt und nutzt. Sokolova-und-Kefi-2020 gilt doppelt im Handwerk — Stricker folgen Machern.
hook_examples: "Was ist im Stash meiner Designerin und was die KI denkt was ich stricken sollte" — Schreibtisch-Shot.
"Ich habe meinen kompletten Stash gescannt und das hier fand ich" — emotionaler Payoff.
"Mein Fiber-Festival-Haul, jedes Label gescannt" — Haul-Reel.
"Wie ich mein nächstes Design plane" — Designer-Prozess-Vlog.
"Als Indie-Färberin sag ich meinen Kunden das hier zu nutzen" — Autoritäts-Play.
"Was ich beim Scannen von 200 Labels gelernt habe" — Pattern-Discovery.
"Mein Stash vorher und nachher der KI" — Vorher/Nachher-Reveal.
"Drei Monate mit der App — ehrliche Review" — direkt zur Kamera.
do_dont: Do: Link in Caption UND IG-Bio.
Don't: den Awin-Angle für Designer/Färber-Audiences skippen.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Hands-on-Yarn-POV. Stash-Flat-Lay. FO-Carousel. Top-Down-Craft-Shots. Knot-Stitch-Style-Hands-Only-YouTube. Faserkunst ist ungewöhnlich Faceless-freundlich weil die Arbeit IST die Demonstration.
hook_examples: Top-Down-Stash-Scan-Demo.
Hands-on-Yarn-Stash-Organisation-Time-Lapse.
Stille FO-Carousel.
Voiceover-Only-Walkthrough: Hände arbeiten.
ASMR-adjacent: Woll-Handling-Geräusche + Scan-Beats.
Stop-Motion: Wollknäuel die sich in App-Kategorien organisieren.
Tutorial-Carousel: "Wie man den KI-Label-Scan nutzt".
Time-Lapse: 60 Sekunden von "Regal voll unbekannter Wolle" zu "organisiertem Stash".

de.posting_cadence: Craft: Sonntag-Morgen 8-11h + Mittwoch-Abend 19-21h Lokal. KnittingTok: Wochenend-Morgen peakt. Pattern-Designer posten in Bögen (Design → Prozess → Sample → Release). 1 Reel pro Woche. Stories während Fiber-Festivals oder Pattern-Drops treiben Conversion.
de.conversion_math: 50% Rev-Share auf Premium (24 Monate) + Awin-Provisions-Anteil auf jeden Wollkauf von referrals (24 Monate). Premium 4,99 USD/m oder 29,99 USD/y. Unabhängige Pattern-Designerin (40k IG): 18.000 Views x 2,5% CTR = 450 Clicks, 35% Install = 158 Installs, 6% Premium = 9 Subs (~135 USD/Jahr) + Awin-Attach: 30% werden Woll-Käufer, 47 Käufer x 3 Warenkörbe/Jahr x ~5 USD Anteil = ~700 USD/Jahr Awin. Total ~835 USD/Jahr aus einem Reel. CrochetTok Mid-Tier (100k TT): 50.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 750 Clicks, 30% Install = 225 Installs, 4% Premium = 9 Subs (~135 USD) + Awin: 25% Käufer-Rate = 56 x 2 x 4 USD = ~450 USD. Total ~585 USD/Jahr. Indie-Wollfärberin (10k IG Carousel): 4.000 Views x 4% CTR = 160 Clicks, 50% Install = 80 Installs, 8% Premium = 6 Subs (~90 USD) + Awin sehr hoch (Audience IST Käufer), 60 x 5 x 5 USD = ~1.500 USD/Jahr. Total ~1.590 USD/Jahr — Designer und Färber haben den höchsten LTV.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, Label-Scan-Demo-Footage, Stash-Tour-B-Roll, Farbpalette und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/yarnstash/brand-assets.
faq: User klickt deinen Link, installiert, kauft Wolle In-App via Knit Picks oder Minerva, Awin feuert ein Postback. Klar verdient ~5-10% Provision pro Warenkorb; dein Anteil ist Teil davon. 24-Monate-Attribution.
Attribuiert nicht — nur In-App via die Awin-deep-linked Shop-Schiene. Feature nicht Bug: saubere Attribution schlägt schwammiges 'vielleicht'-Tracking.
Ja, aber Ravelry hat Regeln zu Derivat-Content. Linke deine eigenen Designs immer auf Ravelry als Primär-Quelle.
Kein Fit — andere App. Wir bauen spezifisch für Woll-basiertes Handwerk.
Designer- und Färber-Audiences kommandieren höhere Rates wegen Nischen-Vertrauens. Mid-Tier 150-500 USD, Macros 500-1500 USD. Rev-Share + Awin obendrauf.
Ja. Rev-Share + Awin-Provision = bezahlte Empfehlung. Craft-Audiences sind unbarmherzig bei versteckten Affiliate-Links.
de.closing: Ehrlich: My Yarn Stash passt zu Creator die tatsächlich stricken oder häkeln. Designer, Färber, KnittingTok, CrochetTok, Stash-Tour, FO-Carousels — alle gute Fits. Reiner Ästhetik-Faser-Content wo niemand tatsächlich strickt passt nicht. Die Awin-Schiene macht Designer und Färber-Creator besonders lukrativ weil ihre Audience eh ständig Wolle kauft. Antworte auf Mail 2 — ja, nein, oder 'lass mal schauen ob meine Audience Wolle kauft'.

it.subtitle: per creator knitting e crochet — e cosa dice la ricerca
it.hero_quote: Foto dell'etichetta del filato dentro, app estrae tutto, match con pattern Ravelry dal tuo stash. Guadagna da quello che condividi comunque.
it.sixty_seconds_intro: My Yarn Stash è un'app iOS + Android per hobby-knitter e crocheter. Fotografi l'etichetta, AI estrae materiale, metratura, ferri, produttore, colore. App matcha pattern Ravelry che puoi davvero lavorare dal TUO stash. Plus: tracking progetti, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing. App Store live da maggio 2026.
it.why_this_works: App mobile di Ravelry è morta dal redesign 2020. 10M+ knitter senza soluzione nativa. My Yarn Stash riempie la lacuna con AI auto-fill che nessun altro ha.
free_vs_premium: Gratis: 30 filati, 1 gruppo fino a 5 membri, manuale + foto-scan, pattern-match search.
Premium (4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y): stash illimitato, gruppi illimitati, AI pattern-match, tracking avanzato.
Premium gratuito a vita per affiliati onboarded.
it.creator_types_intro: Per knitting/crochet, due rotte contano — conversione sub E Awin shop attach. Designer e dyer convertono debolmente su sub ma forte su shop.

creator_types_table.hooks: "Cosa c'è nello stash della mia designer"; processo design con stash; "l'app che uso per pianificare i miei design"
Demo scan etichetta; stash-tour con overlay app; reveal project-match
"Tingere una colorway, ecco come i miei clienti tracciano"; showcase organizzazione stash

FO carousel con dati metratura app in caption; time-lapse log progetto
"Granny-square ma stash-consapevole"; setup stash principiante; "il mio primo scan e cosa ha trovato"

ugc_strategy.archetype: Tu con la tua lana. Designer alla scrivania con WIP. Dyer nel tuo studio. Stash-tour host con i tuoi scaffali fisici. Audience riconosce in 2 secondi se possiedi e usi la lana.
hook_examples: "Cosa c'è nello stash della mia designer e cosa l'AI pensa dovrei lavorare".
"Ho scannerizzato tutto il mio stash ed ecco cosa ho trovato" — payoff emotivo.
"Il mio haul fiber-festival, ogni etichetta scannerizzata".

do_dont: Do: usa il tuo stash vero.
Do: link in caption E IG-bio.
Don't: skippare angle Awin per audience designer/dyer.

faceless_strategy.archetype: POV mani-su-filato. Stash flat-lay. FO carousel. Top-down craft shots.
hook_examples: Demo scan stash top-down.
Time-lapse organizzazione stash mani-su-filato.
FO carousel silenzioso.
Walkthrough voiceover-only: mani che lavorano.

Tutorial carousel: "Come usare il scan AI etichetta".
Time-lapse: 60s da "scaffali di filato sconosciuto" a "stash organizzato".
do_dont: Do: mantieni suono ambient (rumore filato, clic ferri).
Don't: skippare momento FO logbook in FO carousel.

audience_fit_good: Pattern designer indipendenti (engagement + Awin attach altissimi).
audience_fit_poor: Account DIY/craft generali senza focus filato.
Contenuto fibra solo-estetica (slow-motion accarezzare filato senza tessere).
Handicraft non-filato (cucito, ricamo — app stash sbagliata).
it.posting_cadence: Craft: domenica mattina 8-11h + mercoledì sera 19-21h locale. KnittingTok: mattine weekend peakano. Pattern designer postano in archi (design → processo → sample → release). 1 reel a settimana. Story durante fiber-festival o pattern-drops guidano conversione.
it.conversion_math: 50% rev-share su Premium (24 mesi) + quota Awin commissione su ogni acquisto filato da referrals (24 mesi). Premium 4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y. Pattern designer indipendente (40k IG): 18.000 view x 2,5% CTR = 450 clic, 35% install = 158 install, 6% Premium = 9 abbonati (~135 USD/anno) + Awin attach: 30% diventano compratori filato, 47 x 3 cestini/anno x ~5 USD = ~700 USD/anno Awin. Totale ~835 USD/anno per reel. CrochetTok mid-tier (100k TT): 50.000 view x 1,5% CTR = 750 clic, 30% install = 225 install, 4% Premium = 9 abbonati (~135 USD) + Awin: 25% buyer-rate = 56 x 2 x 4 USD = ~450 USD. Totale ~585 USD/anno. Dyer indie (10k IG carousel): 4.000 view x 4% CTR = 160 clic, 50% install = 80 install, 8% Premium = 6 abbonati (~90 USD) + Awin altissimo (audience SONO compratori), 60 x 5 x 5 USD = ~1.500 USD/anno. Totale ~1.590 USD/anno — designer e dyer hanno LTV più alto.
it.brand_assets: Logo, screenshot app, footage demo scan etichetta, B-roll stash-tour, palette colori e caption pronte: getklar.org/i/yarnstash/brand-assets.
faq: User clicca tuo link, installa, compra filato in-app via Knit Picks o Minerva, Awin fa postback. Klar guadagna ~5-10% per cestino; tua quota è parte. 24 mesi di attribution.
Non attribuisce — solo in-app via la rotta shop deep-linked Awin.
Sì, ma Ravelry ha regole su contenuto derivato. Linka sempre i tuoi design a Ravelry come fonte primaria.
Audience designer e dyer comandano rate più alti per nicchia-fiducia. Mid-tier 150-500 USD, macro 500-1500 USD.
Sì. Rev-share + commissione Awin = raccomandazione retribuita.
it.closing: Onestà: My Yarn Stash va bene con creator che davvero tessono o uncinettano. Designer, dyer, KnittingTok, CrochetTok, stash-tour, FO carousel — tutti buoni fit. Contenuto fibra solo-estetica dove nessuno davvero tesse non va bene. La rotta Awin rende designer e dyer particolarmente lucrativi. Rispondi alla Mail 2.

fr.subtitle: pour créateurs knitting et crochet — et ce que dit la recherche
fr.hero_quote: Photo de l'étiquette du fil dedans, app extrait tout, match avec patterns Ravelry de ton stash. Gagne sur ce que tu partages déjà.
fr.sixty_seconds_intro: My Yarn Stash est une app iOS + Android pour hobby-knitters et crocheteurs. Tu photographies l'étiquette, IA extrait matière, métrage, aiguilles, fabricant, couleur. App matche les patterns Ravelry que tu peux vraiment tricoter de TON stash. Plus : tracking projets, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing. App Store live depuis mai 2026.
fr.why_this_works: L'app mobile de Ravelry est morte depuis le redesign 2020. 10M+ knitters sans solution native. My Yarn Stash remplit la lacune avec IA auto-fill que personne n'a.
free_vs_premium: Gratuit : 30 fils, 1 groupe jusqu'à 5 membres, manuel + foto-scan, pattern-match search.
Premium (4,99 USD/m ou 29,99 USD/y) : stash illimité, groupes illimités, IA pattern-match, tracking avancé.
Premium gratuit à vie pour affiliés onboarded.
fr.creator_types_intro: Pour knitting/crochet, deux rails comptent — conversion sub ET Awin shop attach. Designers et dyers convertissent faiblement sur subs mais fort sur shop.

creator_types_table.hooks: "Ce qu'il y a dans le stash de ma designer" ; processus design avec stash ; "l'app que j'utilise pour planifier mes designs"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 3-5% sur subs, Awin attach très haut

creator_types_table.hooks: Démo scan étiquette ; stash-tour avec overlay app ; reveal project-match
"Teindre une colorway, voilà comment mes clients tracent" ; showcase organisation stash
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4% sur subs, Awin attach très haut

creator_types_table.hooks: Stash tour avec app-scan overlay ; festival haul avec scan-étiquette reel ; démo pattern-match-de-haul
FO carrousel avec données métrage app en caption ; time-lapse log projet
"Granny-square mais stash-conscient" ; setup stash débutant ; "mon premier scan et ce qu'il a trouvé"

ugc_strategy.archetype: Toi avec ton fil. Designer au bureau avec WIP. Dyer dans ton studio. Stash-tour host avec tes étagères physiques. Audience reconnaît en 2 secondes si tu possèdes et utilises le fil.
hook_examples: "Ce qu'il y a dans le stash de ma designer et ce que l'IA pense que je devrais tricoter".
"J'ai scanné tout mon stash et voilà ce que j'ai trouvé" — payoff émotionnel.
"Mon haul fiber-festival, chaque étiquette scannée".
"Comment je planifie mon prochain design" — vlog processus designer.
"En tant que dyer indie, voilà ce que je dis à mes clients d'utiliser" — autorité.
"Ce que j'ai appris en scannant 200 étiquettes" — pattern-discovery.
"Mon stash avant et après l'IA" — reveal.
"Trois mois en utilisant cette app — review honnête".
do_dont: Do : lien en caption ET IG-bio.
Don't : skipper l'angle Awin pour audience designer/dyer.

faceless_strategy.archetype: POV mains-sur-fil. Stash flat-lay. FO carrousel. Top-down craft shots.
hook_examples: Démo scan stash top-down.
Time-lapse organisation stash mains-sur-fil.
FO carrousel silencieux.
Walkthrough voix-off only : mains qui travaillent.
ASMR-adjacent : sons wool-handling + scan.
Stop-motion : pelotes qui s'organisent dans les catégories app.
Tutorial carrousel : "Comment utiliser le scan IA étiquette".
Time-lapse : 60s de "étagères de fil inconnu" à "stash organisé".
do_dont: Do : garder son ambient (bruit fil, clics aiguilles).
Don't : skipper moment FO logbook dans FO carrousels.

audience_fit_good: Pattern designers indépendants (engagement + Awin attach très hauts).
audience_fit_poor: Comptes DIY/craft généraux sans focus fil.
Contenu fibre seule-esthétique (slow-motion caresser le fil sans tricoter).
Handicraft non-fil (couture, broderie — mauvaise app stash).
fr.posting_cadence: Craft : dimanche matin 8-11h + mercredi soir 19-21h local. KnittingTok : matins weekend peakent. Pattern designers postent en arcs (design → process → sample → release). 1 reel par semaine. Stories durant fiber-festivals ou pattern-drops guident conversion.
fr.conversion_math: 50% rev-share sur Premium (24 mois) + part Awin commission sur chaque achat fil de referrals (24 mois). Premium 4,99 USD/m ou 29,99 USD/y. Pattern designer indépendante (40k IG) : 18 000 vues x 2,5% CTR = 450 clics, 35% install = 158 installs, 6% Premium = 9 abonnés (~135 USD/an) + Awin attach : 30% deviennent acheteurs de fil, 47 x 3 paniers/an x ~5 USD = ~700 USD/an Awin. Total ~835 USD/an par reel. CrochetTok mid-tier (100k TT) : 50 000 vues x 1,5% CTR = 750 clics, 30% install = 225 installs, 4% Premium = 9 abonnés (~135 USD) + Awin : 25% buyer-rate = 56 x 2 x 4 USD = ~450 USD. Total ~585 USD/an. Dyer indie (10k IG carrousel) : 4 000 vues x 4% CTR = 160 clics, 50% install = 80 installs, 8% Premium = 6 abonnés (~90 USD) + Awin très haut (audience SONT acheteurs), 60 x 5 x 5 USD = ~1 500 USD/an. Total ~1 590 USD/an — designers et dyers ont LTV le plus haut.
fr.brand_assets: Logo, captures app, footage démo scan étiquette, B-roll stash-tour, palette de couleurs et captions prêts : getklar.org/i/yarnstash/brand-assets.
faq: User clique ton lien, installe, achète fil in-app via Knit Picks ou Minerva, Awin fait postback. Klar gagne ~5-10% par panier ; ta part est portion. 24 mois d'attribution.
N'attribue pas — seulement in-app via le rail shop deep-linked Awin.
Oui, mais Ravelry a des règles sur contenu dérivé. Linke toujours tes designs à Ravelry comme source primaire.
Audiences designer et dyer commandent rates plus haut par confiance-niche. Mid-tier 150-500 USD, macros 500-1500 USD.
Oui. Rev-share + commission Awin = recommandation rémunérée.
fr.closing: Honnêtement : My Yarn Stash colle avec créateurs qui tricotent ou crochètent vraiment. Designers, dyers, KnittingTok, CrochetTok, stash-tour, FO carrousels — tous bons fits. Contenu fibre seule-esthétique où personne ne tricote vraiment ne colle pas. Le rail Awin rend designers et dyers particulièrement lucratifs. Réponds à la Mail 2.

es.subtitle: para creators knitting y crochet — y qué dice la investigación
es.hero_quote: Foto de la etiqueta del hilo dentro, app extrae todo, match con patrones Ravelry de tu stash. Gana de lo que ya compartes.
es.sixty_seconds_intro: My Yarn Stash es una app iOS + Android para hobby-knitters y crocheters. Fotografías la etiqueta, IA extrae material, metraje, agujas, fabricante, color. App matchea patrones Ravelry que realmente puedes tejer de TU stash. Plus: tracking proyectos, FO logbook, history pattern-match, group sharing. App Store live desde mayo 2026.
es.why_this_works: La app mobile de Ravelry está muerta desde el rediseño 2020. 10M+ knitters sin solución nativa. My Yarn Stash rellena el hueco con IA auto-fill que nadie tiene.
free_vs_premium: Gratis: 30 hilos, 1 grupo hasta 5 miembros, manual + foto-scan, pattern-match search.
Premium (4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y): stash ilimitado, grupos ilimitados, IA pattern-match, tracking avanzado.
Premium gratis de por vida para afiliados onboarded.
es.creator_types_intro: Para knitting/crochet, dos vías importan — conversión sub Y Awin shop attach. Designers y dyers convierten débilmente en subs pero fuerte en shop.

ugc_strategy.archetype: Tú con tu hilo. Designer en escritorio con WIP. Dyer en tu estudio. Stash-tour host con tus estantes físicos. Audiencia reconoce en 2 segundos si posees y usas el hilo.
hook_examples: "Qué hay en el stash de mi designer y qué la IA piensa que debería tejer".
"Escaneé todo mi stash y aquí está lo que encontré" — payoff emocional.
"Mi haul fiber-festival, cada etiqueta escaneada".

faceless_strategy.archetype: POV manos-sobre-hilo. Stash flat-lay. FO carrusel. Top-down craft shots.
hook_examples: Demo escaneo stash top-down.

do_dont: Do: mantén ambient (rumor hilo, clics agujas).

audience_fit_good: Pattern designers independientes (engagement + Awin attach altísimos).
audience_fit_poor: Cuentas DIY/craft generales sin enfoque hilo.
Contenido fibra solo-estética (slow-motion acariciar hilo sin tejer).
Handicraft no-hilo (costura, bordado — app stash equivocada).
es.posting_cadence: Craft: domingo mañana 8-11h + miércoles noche 19-21h local. KnittingTok: mañanas fin de semana peakean. Pattern designers postean en arcos (diseño → proceso → sample → release). 1 reel por semana. Stories durante fiber-festivals o pattern-drops guían conversión.
es.conversion_math: 50% rev-share sobre Premium (24 meses) + parte Awin comisión en cada compra hilo de referrals (24 meses). Premium 4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y. Pattern designer independiente (40k IG): 18.000 vistas x 2,5% CTR = 450 clics, 35% install = 158 instalaciones, 6% Premium = 9 suscriptores (~135 USD/año) + Awin attach: 30% se vuelven compradores hilo, 47 x 3 cestas/año x ~5 USD = ~700 USD/año Awin. Total ~835 USD/año por reel. CrochetTok mid-tier (100k TT): 50.000 vistas x 1,5% CTR = 750 clics, 30% install = 225 instalaciones, 4% Premium = 9 suscriptores (~135 USD) + Awin: 25% buyer-rate = 56 x 2 x 4 USD = ~450 USD. Total ~585 USD/año. Dyer indie (10k IG carrusel): 4.000 vistas x 4% CTR = 160 clics, 50% install = 80 instalaciones, 8% Premium = 6 suscriptores (~90 USD) + Awin altísimo (audiencia SON compradores), 60 x 5 x 5 USD = ~1.500 USD/año. Total ~1.590 USD/año — designers y dyers tienen el LTV más alto.
es.brand_assets: Logo, capturas app, footage demo escaneo etiqueta, B-roll stash-tour, paleta de color y captions listos: getklar.org/i/yarnstash/brand-assets.
faq: User clica tu enlace, instala, compra hilo in-app vía Knit Picks o Minerva, Awin hace postback. Klar gana ~5-10% por cesta; tu parte es porción. 24 meses de atribución.
No atribuye — solo in-app vía la vía shop deep-linked Awin.
Sí, pero Ravelry tiene reglas sobre contenido derivado. Linkea siempre tus diseños a Ravelry como fuente primaria.
Audiencias designer y dyer comandan rates más altos por confianza-nicho. Mid-tier 150-500 USD, macros 500-1500 USD.
Sí. Rev-share + comisión Awin = recomendación remunerada.
es.closing: Honestamente: My Yarn Stash encaja con creators que realmente tejen o ganchillan. Designers, dyers, KnittingTok, CrochetTok, stash-tour, FO carruseles — todos buenos fits. Contenido fibra solo-estética donde nadie realmente teje no encaja. La vía Awin hace a designers y dyers particularmente lucrativos. Responde al Mail 2.
